name: mu Bond
redeem: Direct redemption is available only to approved KYC-cleared counterparties and normally enters a redemption queue tied to a weekly liquidity schedule; Mu Digital says to expect about 7 calendar days, though small amounts may redeem faster from an onchain liquidity buffer. Users may also exit permissionlessly via supported onchain swaps if liquidity is available.
notes: Junior first-loss tranche of Mu Digital's Asia credit portfolio. NAV/repricing is published periodically and docs say the price feed is initially updated manually from offchain sources.
